news.t: US Benchmark Series Announces Launch of the US Treasury 12 Month Bill ETF

overview.description: The US Treasury 12 Month Bill ETF (OBIL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Treasury Bellwether 1Y index. The fund is a passively managed, single-bond fund that invests in the most recently issued, on-the-run, 12-month US Treasury bill. The fund is designed for those specifically required to track the 12-month tenor on the yield curve OBIL was launched on Nov 15, 2022 and is issued by F/m Investments.
